'''鈭歫-l-v''' ('''kajalav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jone|jone]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-l-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jone|jone]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-l-v
|-
! Lemma
| kajalav
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijalav|thijalav]] || [[word:jijalav|jijalav]] || [[word:shijalav|shijalav]] || [[word:kijalav|kijalav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujalav|thuthujalav]] || [[word:jujujalav|jujujalav]] || [[word:shushujalav|shushujalav]] || [[word:kukujalav|kukujalav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujalav|thujalav]] || [[word:jujalav|jujalav]] || [[word:shujalav|shujalav]] || [[word:kujalav|kujalav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujalav|thujalav]] || [[word:jujalav|jujalav]] || [[word:shujalav|shujalav]] || [[word:kujalav|kujalav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejalav|thejalav]] || [[word:jejalav|jejalav]] || [[word:shejalav|shejalav]] || [[word:kejalav|kejalav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojalav|thothojalav]] || [[word:jojojalav|jojojalav]] || [[word:shoshojalav|shoshojalav]] || [[word:kokojalav|kokojalav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojalav|thojalav]] || [[word:jojalav|jojalav]] || [[word:shojalav|shojalav]] || [[word:kojalav|kojalav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojalav|thojalav]] || [[word:jojalav|jojalav]] || [[word:shojalav|shojalav]] || [[word:kojalav|kojalav]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:jalav|jalav]] || [[word:jalav|jalav]] || [[word:jalav|jalav]] || [[word:jalav|jalav]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:jalav|jalav]] || [[word:jalav|jalav]] || [[word:jalav|jalav]] || [[word:jalav|jalav]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:jalav|jalav]] || [[word:jalav|jalav]] || [[word:jalav|jalav]] || [[word:jalav|jalav]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:jalav|jalav]] || [[word:jalav|jalav]] || [[word:jalav|jalav]] || [[word:jalav|jalav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙jalav|th忙jalav]] || [[word:j忙jalav|j忙jalav]] || [[word:sh忙jalav|sh忙jalav]] || [[word:k忙jalav|k忙jalav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajalav|thathajalav]] || [[word:jajajalav|jajajalav]] || [[word:shashajalav|shashajalav]] || [[word:kakajalav|kakajalav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajalav|thajalav]] || [[word:jajalav|jajalav]] || [[word:shajalav|shajalav]] || [[word:kajalav|kajalav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajalav|thajalav]] || [[word:jajalav|jajalav]] || [[word:shajalav|shajalav]] || [[word:kajalav|kajalav]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajalav|shajalav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajalav|goshajalav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajalav|gokishajalav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajalavn眉|shajalavn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajalavnkn眉|goshajalavnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajalavn眉|gokishajalavn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajalavsh毛|shajalavsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajalavnksh毛|goshajalavnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajalavsh毛|gokishajalavsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajalavro|shajalavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajalavnkro|goshajalavnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajalavro|gokishajalavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajalavmu|shajalavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajalavnkmu|goshajalavnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajalavmu|gokishajalavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajalavsher|shajalavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajalavnksher|goshajalavnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajalavsher|gokishajalavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajalavng|shajalavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajalavnkng|goshajalavnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajalavng|gokishajalavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajalavya|shajalavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajalavnkya|goshajalavnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajalavya|gokishajalavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajalavyam|shajalavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajalavnkyam|goshajalavnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajalavyam|gokishajalavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajalavn眉sh毛|shajalavn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajalavnkn眉sh毛|goshajalavnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajalavn眉sh毛|gokishajalavn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajalavn眉ro|shajalavn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajalavnkn眉ro|goshajalavnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajalavn眉ro|gokishajalavn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajalavn眉mu|shajalavn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajalavnkn眉mu|goshajalavnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajalavn眉mu|gokishajalavn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajalavsh毛n眉|shajalavsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajalavnksh毛n眉|goshajalavnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajalavsh毛n眉|gokishajalavsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajalavsh毛ro|shajalavsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajalavnksh毛ro|goshajalavnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajalavsh毛ro|gokishajalavsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajalavsh毛mu|shajalavsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajalavnksh毛mu|goshajalavnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajalavsh毛mu|gokishajalavsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajalavron眉|shajalavron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajalavnkron眉|goshajalavnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajalavron眉|gokishajalavron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajalavrosh毛|shajalavrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajalavnkrosh毛|goshajalavnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajalavrosh毛|gokishajalavrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajalavromu|shajalavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajalavnkromu|goshajalavnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajalavromu|gokishajalavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajalavmun眉|shajalavmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajalavnkmun眉|goshajalavnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajalavmun眉|gokishajalavmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajalavmush毛|shajalavmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajalavnkmush毛|goshajalavnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajalavmush毛|gokishajalavmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajalavmuro|shajalavmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajalavnkmuro|goshajalavnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajalavmuro|gokishajalavmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
